recommendations.title: The Door
recommendations.overview: A successful artist loses control of his life after his young daughter's death. A chance for a new start appears, but all is not what it seems.

recommendations.title: ATM

recommendations.title: Hotarubi no Mori e
recommendations.overview: One hot summer day a little girl gets lost in an enchanted forest of the mountain god where spirits reside. A young boy appears before her, but she cannot touch him for fear of making him disappear. And so a wondrous adventure awaits...

recommendations.title: Summer's Blood
recommendations.overview: A demented handyman comes to the rescue of a young woman, then imprisons her in his basement.

recommendations.title: Werewolf of London
recommendations.overview: A strange animal attack turns a botanist into a bloodthirsty monster.

recommendations.title: The Legend of the Nahuala

recommendations.title: Slaughterhouse Rulez
recommendations.overview: An illustrious British boarding school becomes a bloody battleground when a mysterious sinkhole appears at a nearby fracking site unleashing unspeakable horror.

recommendations.title: Bubba Ho-tep

recommendations.title: Utøya: July 22
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl fights for survival and to locate her young sister during the 2011 terrorist attack at a political summer camp on the Norwegian island of Utøya.

recommendations.title: The Brothers Grimm
